case_title: PETER J. FATOOH VS. LIN FAMILY TRUST, ROGER LIN TRUSTEE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIN FAMILY TRUST, ROGER LIN TRUSTEE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $698.90 FILED BY FATOOH, PETER J. AS TO DEFENDANT LIN FAMILY TRUST, ROGER LIN TRUSTEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $25.00) SERVED JUN-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN FAMILY TRUST, ROGER LIN TRUSTEE
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FATOOH, PETER J.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PETER J. FATOOH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIN FAMILY TRUST, ROGER LIN TRUSTEE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROGER LIN, TRUSTEE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE AUGUST HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
